response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software engineering experience with strong full-stack credentials matching the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB). Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the AI agent development requirement. Solid background in testing, craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD), and architecture. Minor gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin/Java depth in recent work, but breadth and seniority compensate.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB stack match with 6+ years
Deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent tooling, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older and limited
Cloud/containerization mentioned only briefly (AWS CDK, Docker) without depth

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited recent Kotlin
